security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost https:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* https://github.com https://api.github.com https://gitlab.com https://api.bitbucket.org https://dev.azure.com https://*.openai.com https://api.anthropic.com https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com https://api.mistral.ai; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: A fast, friendly cross-platform Git client.
bundle.longDescription: Lady is a fast, friendly cross-platform Git client (Fork-style UI + GitKraken-style AI), built in Rust.
